label: 2023 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
race_name: Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres

extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked solo on the second ascent of Oude Kwaremont-Paterberg, built 30+ seconds on VAN DER POEL, held to win by 15s.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked repeatedly on paired Kwaremont-Paterberg climbs to prevent sprint finish, exploiting van der Poel's strengths preemptively.
VAN DER POEL mechanical on critical climb fractured his response rhythm despite regaining contact before final selection.
PEDERSEN survived long quality breakaway to contest podium, showing Trek's tactic of placing riders forward paid minor places.
VAN HOOYDONCK sacrificed own result domestique work when VAN AERT dropped, revealing Jumbo-Visma lacked backup plan depth.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Dominated paired Kwaremont-Paterberg climbs with repeated attacks, refused to allow sprint scenario despite being marked.
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: neutral: Chain mechanical on key climb cost momentum but regained contact; ultimately lacked answer to POGAČAR's sustained efforts.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Despite Jumbo-Visma being 'clearly strongest team,' dropped on Kwaremont-Paterberg and never factored in finale.
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: Animated 15-rider quality breakaway, survived regrouping by favorites to sprint for podium from reduced group.
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: Finished fourth from breakaway despite favorites' junction, showing exceptional resilience in Monument finale positioning.
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: Placed fifth, indicating time trial specialists with cobbles skills can survive Monument selections when positioned correctly.
rider_signals.VAN HOOYDONCK Nathan: neutral: Burned own chances supporting dropped VAN AERT, confirms Jumbo domestique prioritization even when leader eliminated.
